title: The Python Environment
source_outline: Why Python for AI work: readability and low syntax overhead; the AI/ML ecosystem and why Python dominates it; where Python sits in an AI-native workflow
The Python interpreter and interactive mode: interpreted vs compiled languages (concept); the REPL / interactive mode
Google Colab as the standard environment: cells and run order; the runtime and restarting it; saving notebooks to Google Drive
Running your first program: the print() function; executing cells in sequence and reading output

next_assessment.title: Python Core Skills Checkpoint
next_assessment.outcome: The learner can translate a plain-English problem into correct, tested Python using variables, control flow, and functions.
